name: asf-lib
documentation:
# Algorithm Selection and Performance Prediction Framework
Currently under development

Roadmap:
[]

classes.name: asf.selectors.pairwise_regression.PairwiseRegressor

methods.name: asf.selectors.pairwise_regression.PairwiseRegressor.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the PairwiseRegressor with a given model class and hierarchical feature generator.

Args:
    model_class: The regression model to be used for pairwise comparisons.
    hierarchical_generator (AbstractFeatureGenerator, optional): The feature generator to be used. Defaults to DummyFeatureGenerator.

methods.name: asf.selectors.pairwise_regression.PairwiseRegressor._fit
documentation:
Fits the pairwise regressors using the provided features and performance data.

Args:
    features (pd.DataFrame): The feature data for the instances.
    performance (pd.DataFrame): The performance data for the algorithms.

methods.name: asf.selectors.pairwise_regression.PairwiseRegressor._predict
documentation:
Predicts the best algorithm for each instance using the trained pairwise regressors.

Args:
    features (pd.DataFrame): The feature data for the instances.

Returns:
    dict: A dictionary mapping instance names to the predicted best algorithm.

methods.name: asf.selectors.pairwise_regression.PairwiseRegressor.generate_features
documentation:
Generates features for the pairwise regressors.

Args:
    features (pd.DataFrame): The feature data for the instances.

Returns:
    np.ndarray: An array of predictions for each instance and algorithm pair.

PairwiseRegressor is a selector that uses pairwise regression of algorithms
to predict the best algorithm for a given instance.

Attributes:
    model_class: The regression model to be used for pairwise comparisons.
    regressors: List of trained regressors for pairwise comparisons.

classes.name: asf.selectors.performance_model.PerformancePredictor

methods.name: asf.selectors.performance_model.PerformancePredictor.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the PerformancePredictor with the given parameters.

Args:
    model_class: The class of the regression model to be used.
    metadata: Metadata containing information about the algorithms.
    use_multi_target: Boolean indicating whether to use multi-target regression.
    normalize: Method to normalize the performance data.
    hierarchical_generator: Feature generator to be used.

methods.name: asf.selectors.performance_model.PerformancePredictor._fit
documentation:
Fits the regression models to the given features and performance data.

Args:
    features: DataFrame containing the feature data.
    performance: DataFrame containing the performance data.

methods.name: asf.selectors.performance_model.PerformancePredictor._predict
documentation:
Predicts the performance of algorithms for the given features.

Args:
    features: DataFrame containing the feature data.

Returns:
    A dictionary mapping instance names to the predicted best algorithm.

methods.name: asf.selectors.performance_model.PerformancePredictor.generate_features
documentation:
Generates predictions for the given features using the trained models.

Args:
    features: DataFrame containing the feature data.

Returns:
    DataFrame containing the predictions for each algorithm.

PerformancePredictor is a class that predicts the performance of algorithms
based on given features. It can handle both single-target and multi-target
regression models.

Attributes:
    model_class: The class of the regression model to be used.
    metadata: Metadata containing information about the algorithms.
    use_multi_target: Boolean indicating whether to use multi-target regression.
    normalize: Method to normalize the performance data.
    regressors: List of trained regression models.

classes.name: asf.selectors.mutli_class.MultiClassClassifier

methods.name: asf.selectors.mutli_class.MultiClassClassifier.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the MultiClassClassifier with the given parameters.

Args:
    model_class: The class of the classification model to be used.
    metadata: Metadata containing information about the algorithms.
    hierarchical_generator: Feature generator to be used.

methods.name: asf.selectors.mutli_class.MultiClassClassifier._fit
documentation:
Fits the classification model to the given feature and performance data.

Args:
    features: DataFrame containing the feature data.
    performance: DataFrame containing the performance data.

methods.name: asf.selectors.mutli_class.MultiClassClassifier._predict
documentation:
Predicts the best algorithm for each instance in the given feature data.

Args:
    features: DataFrame containing the feature data.

Returns:
    A dictionary mapping instance names to the predicted best algorithm.

MultiClassClassifier is a class that predicts the best algorithm for a given instance
using a multi-class classification model.

Attributes:
    model_class: The class of the classification model to be used.
    metadata: Metadata containing information about the algorithms.
    classifier: The trained classification model.

classes.name: asf.selectors.pairwise_classifier.PairwiseClassifier

methods.name: asf.selectors.pairwise_classifier.PairwiseClassifier.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the PairwiseClassifier with a given model class and hierarchical feature generator.

Args:
    model_class (ClassifierMixin): The classifier model to be used for pairwise comparisons.
    hierarchical_generator (AbstractFeatureGenerator, optional): The feature generator to be used. Defaults to DummyFeatureGenerator.

methods.name: asf.selectors.pairwise_classifier.PairwiseClassifier._fit
documentation:
Fits the pairwise classifiers using the provided features and performance data.

Args:
    features (pd.DataFrame): The feature data for the instances.
    performance (pd.DataFrame): The performance data for the algorithms.

methods.name: asf.selectors.pairwise_classifier.PairwiseClassifier._predict
documentation:
Predicts the best algorithm for each instance using the trained pairwise classifiers.

Args:
    features (pd.DataFrame): The feature data for the instances.

Returns:
    dict: A dictionary mapping instance names to the predicted best algorithm.

methods.name: asf.selectors.pairwise_classifier.PairwiseClassifier.generate_features
documentation:
Generates features for the pairwise classifiers.

Args:
    features (pd.DataFrame): The feature data for the instances.

Returns:
    np.ndarray: An array of predictions for each instance and algorithm pair.

PairwiseClassifier is a selector that uses pairwise comparison of algorithms
to predict the best algorithm for a given instance.

Attributes:
    model_class (ClassifierMixin): The classifier model to be used for pairwise comparisons.
    classifiers (list[ClassifierMixin]): List of trained classifiers for pairwise comparisons.

classes.name: asf.aslib_scenario.ASlibScenario

methods.name: asf.aslib_scenario.ASlibScenario.__init__
documentation: Constructor

methods.name: asf.aslib_scenario.ASlibScenario.__getstate__
documentation: method for pickling the object;

methods.name: asf.aslib_scenario.ASlibScenario.read_from_csv
documentation:
create an internal ASlib scenario from csv

Arguments
---------
perf_fn: str
    performance file name in csv format
feat_fn: str
    instance feature file name in csv format
objective: str
    "solution_quality" or "runtime"
runtime_cutoff: float
    maximal runtime cutoff
maximize: bool
    whether to maximize or minimize the objective values
cv_fn: str
    cv split file in csv format

methods.name: asf.aslib_scenario.ASlibScenario.read_scenario
documentation:
read an ASlib scenario from disk

Arguments
---------
dn: str
    directory name with ASlib files

methods.name: asf.aslib_scenario.ASlibScenario.find_files
documentation:
find all expected files in self.dir_
fills self.found_files

methods.name: asf.aslib_scenario.ASlibScenario.read_files
documentation:
iterates over all found files (self.found_files) and 
calls the corresponding function to validate file

methods.name: asf.aslib_scenario.ASlibScenario.read_description
documentation:
reads description file
and saves all meta information

methods.name: asf.aslib_scenario.ASlibScenario.read_algorithm_runs
asf.aslib_scenario.ASlibScenario.read_feature_values
asf.aslib_scenario.ASlibScenario.read_feature_costs
asf.aslib_scenario.ASlibScenario.read_feature_runstatus
asf.aslib_scenario.ASlibScenario.read_ground_truth
asf.aslib_scenario.ASlibScenario.read_cv
asf.aslib_scenario.ASlibScenario.check_data
documentation:
checks whether all data objects are valid according to ASlib specification
and makes some transformations

methods.name: asf.aslib_scenario.ASlibScenario.get_split
documentation:
returns a copy of self but only with the data of the i-th cross validation split according to cv.arff

Arguments
---------
    indx : int
        indx of the cv split (should be in most cases within [1,10]

Returns
-------
    training split : ASlibScenario
    test split : ASlibScenario

methods.name: asf.aslib_scenario.ASlibScenario.create_cv_splits
documentation:
creates cv splits and saves them in self.cv_data

Argumnents
----------
n_folds: int
    number of splits

methods.name: asf.aslib_scenario.ASlibScenario.change_perf_measure
documentation:
change self.performance_data to another performance measure. 
Either measure_idx or measure_name needs to be specified --
measure_name overwrites measure_idx

Arguments
---------
measure_idx : int
    index of performance measure
measure_name: str
    name of performance measure
all data about an algorithm selection scenario
